hotel_name: The King Hotel - Condotel Thai Nguyen

reviews.title: 4-star quality 👍🏻
reviews.text: Friendly , helpful , convenient , clean

reviews.title: It was not worth the money we spent because we were not able to enjoy what was expected in the booking: exceptional brea
reviews.positives: We booked an apartment. It was huge and comfortable. We liked the location, it was near the mall where we could bring the kids.
reviews.negatives: We booked in this hotel so our kids can enjoy the swimming pool. The swimming pool was dirty, my kids cried and were disappointed. Upon booking, They should just put a notice when the pool is working or not. The breakfast was disappointing too. There was not much food served.

reviews.title: The room is comfortable and clean.
reviews.text:
The room is spacious, with separate bedroom and living room. The TV, refrigerator, bathroom, and air conditioner are all good. The gym is nice. There are massage chairs on each floor. 
However, there should be an investment in upgrading the quality of shampoo, conditioner, and body wash. The breakfast is also not reasonable for the room price (simple, and the dishes are not very tasty). The swimming pool needs to be cleaned more frequently. 
A plus is that the café across from the hotel makes a very decent brew.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very clean. Friendly staff.
reviews.negatives: Food options on site. Slippery bathroom floor.

reviews.title: This hotel has a good location.
reviews.text: You booked a 2-bedroom apartment and are very satisfied with the accommodation and the equipment in the room. One minor downside is that there are a bit too few power outlets in the room. There are many diverse restaurants around the hotel.

reviews.title: Comfortable place and good breakfast.
reviews.positives: Spacious and comfortable room. Good location.
reviews.negatives: No divider between the shower stand and toilet area. The whole washroom was wet after every shower.

reviews.title: I often use it during business trips.
reviews.text: This is the accommodation I stay at every time I go on a business trip. The quality is really good for the price. However, it's a bit disappointing that there aren't any decent restaurants nearby.

reviews.title: The room really nice however the only view we had was the aircon units outside.
reviews.positives: The pool
reviews.negatives:
Staff unfriendly but might be due to lack of English language - except for Mr. Mam who was extremely helpful.
They never updated Booking. Com so had no knowledge of our booking when we arrived even though we had made the booking a week previously.
However they upgraded us without the extra cost - they had nothing else left.

reviews.title: The hotel is clean, beautiful, and spacious.
reviews.text: The room is spacious and comfortable, like an apartment. The staff is enthusiastic and polite. The pool needs to be cleaned during the hot seasons. The breakfast is acceptable.

reviews.title: Great stay, great accommodations and great staff.
reviews.positives: Very friendly staff.

reviews.title: King Hotel Condotel
reviews.text: This is a good hotel. Clean. Will come back

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We loved the staff and their attention to detail. The breakfast was wonderful and our room was always comfortable and clean.

reviews.title: Comfortable Stay in Thai Nguyen
reviews.text:
Had a lovely & comfortable stay for a quick business trip. 
Room was spacious, clean and loads of amenities. 
I can highly recommend and great value.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Trop de bruit le soir …. 1h du matin bruit des chambres voisines

reviews.title: The staff is really, really friendly.
reviews.text: The male staff at the front desk is really kind. The room is clean and the facilities are good. I will revisit during my next business trip.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Alles bestens

reviews.title: I made good use of it.
reviews.text: The family was very satisfied with their stay. The location, price, and kindness were all excellent.

reviews.title: Super de luxe hotel!!!
reviews.positives:
Prachtige kamer.
Heerlijk zacht bed, bubbelbad, WC met verwarmde bril, en diverse spoel reinigings mogelijkheden. Bril opende en sloot automatisch 🤣.
TV met Netflix.

Op de hoek links wanneer je naar buiten gaat zit een geweldig vis restaurant. Kies je levende vis uit een bak, kies je bereiding en eet smakelijk!!
Het ontbijt was +- 30 meter lang en werkelijk alles was te krijgen.
Er is een bewaakte inpandige garage.
Er is een zwembad, gym en op iedere verdieping staat een massagestoel.

reviews.title: Should rest here.
reviews.text:
Due to a small mistake when booking the room, there was a bit of a problem upon check-in, but then the hotel staff quickly and reasonably resolved it. When we got the new room, it exceeded our expectations. So sometimes in misfortune, there comes good fortune.  
My personal and my family's feelings when staying here are all very positive. From the design inside and outside the room, the space is reasonable, airy, and comfortable. Even the breakfast buffet was great. Both small and older children were very pleased.  
In summary, it's my first time here, but I really want to come back next time. I recommend everyone to come and relax at The King after their trip.

reviews.title: 大変良い。
reviews.positives: 非常に清潔。部屋もとても広く快適。設備も最新のもので、申し分ない。食事も大変よかったです。
reviews.negatives: お風呂は使いにくい。シャワーだと浴槽の外に水が飛ぶので、シャワーカーテンが必要。浴槽にお湯を溜めようとして使ったが、お湯の出力が弱いので、十分に貯めることができない。

reviews.text: 보통  평범한호텔 입니다

reviews.title: Hotellet er ikke 5 stjerner værdigt.
reviews.positives: Værelset var pænt og rummeligt. Sengene var gode.
reviews.negatives:
Værelset var meget dårligt lyddæmpet, så trafikstøj med videre var ret generende. Der var højest varmt Vand i badet til 10 minutter, og da vi boede 3 på værelset, så vi kunne ikke komme i bad lige efter hinanden…
Morgenmadsbuffeten havde kun Asiatiske retter.
Poolen var sæson lukket under hele opholdet, hvilket ikke var blevet oplyst ved bookningen.

reviews.title: 호텔이 낡긴햇지만 근방에선 좋은호텔

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The room was massive, with a separate sitting area and the bathroom was very sizable. The bed was really comfortable and the pool was incredible!
The bathroom also features a fancy Japanese toilet.
The buffet breakfast was fantastic with a great selection of foods and drinks.
reviews.negatives: The bathroom was unfinished, the mixer handle for the shower didn't work. The restaurant/bar was not open during the listed hours.

reviews.title: Awesome value for money
reviews.positives: Awesome value for money

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Perfect for a stopover during our trip: you park the motorbike in the basement, and you're in your comfy room within minutes. Wide breakfast choices, location is perfect for exploring the city.
reviews.negatives: We were upgraded to the 2-bedroom apartment, but the bedrooms don't have windows and lack natural light throughout.
